backend/main.mo: Main Motoko canister defining legacy-stable public API, backward-compatible user profile types, and various domain types for strategies, licenses, trades, and vaults.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades stored UserProfile records by adding timezone and notificationsEnabled fields with default values.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping features to affected frontend files, components, and test IDs for profile settings and settings page constraints.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of each frontend file, covering screens, components, hooks, utils, and styles.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global stylesheet defining theme variables, dark mode tokens, and base utility styling for the app.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point containing root div and script loader for the React application.
frontend/PHASE1_BACKEND_IMPLEMENTATION_C: Detailed checklist for implementing Phase 1 backend features including API documentation, type extensions, and trade structures.
frontend/ROADMAP_BATCH_EXECUTION.md: Execution plan outlining Phases 3–8 with testable steps, frontend constraints, and backend requirements for future roadmap items.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app routing UI; handles authentication state, loading screens, landing page, and profile setup before rendering the AppShell within the ToastProvider.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Authentication button that triggers Internet Identity login or logout and displays status indicators.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal prompting new users to submit a display name and optional account ID, then saves the profile.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: Simple alert screen notifying users they lack admin permissions.
frontend/src/components/common/ToastProv: Toast context and UI for showing timed success, error, or info notifications.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/AuditL: Displays a scrollable audit log table with loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Header bar with navigation between dashboard and settings plus user name and login button.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Equity: Renders an equity curve chart using Recharts with loading and error fallbacks.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LiveLo: Terminal-style panel showing periodic bot status logs and a button to test connectivity.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LivePu: Terminal-style component that logs bot uplink pings and runs a connectivity test using fetchSignalsTest.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Perfor: Displays an equity curve chart with loading and error states using data from useGetEquityCurve.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/System: Shows bot heartbeat status, license state, cycles, and last heartbeat time based on account-specific heartbeat data.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Uplink: Visualizes uplink on/off state and allows toggling bot uplink via a switch with animated status indicators.
Main app container handling routing, screen selection, header, footer, and rendering dashboard or settings screens.
frontend/src/components/settings/Connect: Panel showing bot connection status and launching a wizard to generate keys and configure bot URL.
Step-by-step wizard modal for generating an Ed25519 keypair, linking the public key, and saving the bot URL.
frontend/src/components/settings/Profile: Form component for displaying and updating the user's profile settings including name, timezone, and notifications.
frontend/src/components/settings/Subscri: Renders subscription tiers with pricing, descriptions, and features in a grid layout.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user's identity, refreshing dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: Provides admin-related queries and mutations for checking admin status and managing licenses.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditLedger.ts: Fetches paginated audit log entries with periodic refresh.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUserProfile: Loads and saves the current user's profile using the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useEquityCurve.ts: Builds an equity curve from the user's trades by calculating running PnL.
frontend/src/hooks/useFetchSignalsTest.t: Runs a test fetch of trading signals and displays toast notifications based on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartbeat.ts: Fetches heartbeat data for a given account with periodic polling.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Handles Internet Identity authentication, storing identity state and providing login/logout functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useLicense.ts: Retrieves the caller's license status via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useLinkBotPublicKey.t: Links a bot public key via mutation and updates related queries with toast feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useLiveLogs.ts: Retrieves live trade logs for the user's account with frequent polling.
frontend/src/hooks/useProfileSettings.ts: Fetches and updates the caller's user profile with optimistic updates and error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetBotUrl.ts: Provides a mutation hook to update the bot URL with validation, error handling, and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrades.ts: Fetches paginated trades for an account using query parameters and actor calls.
frontend/src/hooks/useUplink.ts: Includes hooks to retrieve the bot profile and toggle uplink state with toast feedback and cache updates.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles with custom color variables, dark mode settings, and a glassmorphism utility.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a utility for merging class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes the React app with react-query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/screens/AdminScreen.tsx: Admin UI for managing licenses, including creation, updates, and revocation with status displays.
frontend/src/screens/DashboardScreen.tsx: Displays uplink control, live terminal, performance telemetry, and audit logs in a grid layout.
frontend/src/screens/OverviewScreen.tsx: Shows the user's license status and account information with loading and empty-state handling.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsRouteScreen: Settings screen with tabs for profile, connections, and admin-only subscription management.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx: Alternate settings layout providing bot connection and subscription sections.
frontend/src/screens/TradesScreen.tsx: Trade history viewer with filters, pagination, and formatted trade data display.
frontend/src/utils/actorErrorMessage.ts: Normalizes various actor error messages into user-friendly strings with specific pattern handling.
frontend/src/utils/encoding.ts: Provides helpers to convert between hexadecimal strings and byte arrays.
frontend/src/utils/format.ts: Formats timestamps for display and computes trade profit or loss values.
frontend/src/utils/tweetnaclSmokeTest.ts: Empty placeholder file for tweetnacl testing.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading, storing, and clearing URL and session parameters, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom themes, fonts, colors, animations, and plugins.
project_state.json: Project state description containing requirements, features, and architectural notes for implementing Profile Settings.
